title: Senior Instructional Designer at Udemy India

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Udemy India
jsonLd.description:
Udemy India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Udemy India:
Udemy India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India!
